subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath established the decree of Divine Unity through the words "There is no God but God" - these words which the Dawning-Place hath uttered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اثبت حکم التوحید بکلمه لا اله الا الله و هذه کلمه نطق بها مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
